ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the resource */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the resource */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the resource was last updated */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the resource has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the resource */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the resource */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Comma-separated keywords for the resource */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Comma-separated IDs of users the resource is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., teacher, admin, curriculum developer) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the discussion is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the discussion */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the discussion */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the discussion was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the discussion was last updated */,
  "pinned" INTEGER /* Whether the discussion is pinned to the top */,
  "locked" INTEGER /* Whether the discussion is locked for further replies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion the reply is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was posted */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the resource */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, reply, edit) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource related to the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the resource file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_files_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the resource */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_versions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the collaborator is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the collaborator (e.g., read, write, owner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_collaborators_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reply, mention, share) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_tags" (
  "resource_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource-tag mapping */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_tags_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)
